name: Garlicky Caesar Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. With a fork, mash the garlic in the olive oil.
2. Whisk in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
3. Let the dressing sit overnight in the refrigerator if you want a stronger garlic flavor.
4. Makes about 1/3 cup.
5. Per tablespoon: Cal 16 / Prot 0 / Fat 1g / Carb 2g / Chol 0g / Sod 27mg / Fiber 0g
